note: Qwen Image Edit 2511 model — research phase started

Dimension research SETTLED (config-verified). Qwen-Edit-2511 input dims must be ÷32: math floor=16 (VAE 8x spatial dim_mult[1,2,4,4] x transformer patch_size 2) but diffusers calculate_dimensions() enforces 32 (issue #12997). Non-÷32 = ValueError (no crop/pad). ImageScaleToTotalPixels (class_type ImageScaleToTotalPixels) MOVED to nodes_post_processing.py on master + gained resolution_steps int (def 1, advanced): width=round(W*scale_by/steps)*steps snaps to multiple. OLD node (nodes_images.py, no longer there / older installs) = bare round, NO snap. resolution_steps = dimension snap granularity NOT sampling steps. RECOMMEND: megapixels=1.0 + resolution_steps=32; VERIFY canvas node has resolution_steps else update ComfyUI. Verified vs raw ComfyUI GitHub master (one sub-agent's stale checkout wrongly said custom-pack-only). Dump: research/dimensions.md, settled: docs/models/qwen-edit/dimensions.md.

CORRECTION (deeper pipeline-source pass): non-÷16 is a WARNING + silent crop/pad, NOT a hard ValueError (I over-stated). calculate_dimensions rounds ITS bucket dims to ÷32 (conservative, not a validation gate). ComfyUI hard-errors separately on attention-reshape shape mismatch (#9421). Practical guidance unchanged: feed ÷32 (resolution_steps=32) to dodge crop/pad + bucket drift. Verified archdata: VAE AutoencoderKLQwenImage f8 (2^len temperal_downsample=2^3), z_dim16; transformer patch_size2, in_channels64(=16*4), 60 blocks, joint_attention_dim3584. Added ComfyUI landmines to docs: black-image=latent_mean/std not applied (#11865), batched VAE-encode 1-img bug fixed ca68660, inpaint VAE unsupported (#9605).
